5.gl: to seven oneself, i.e. swear (as if by repeating a declaration seven times)

5.dv: a primitive root; properly to be complete, but used only as a denominative from H7651 (שֶׁבַע);

5.gl: a daughter (used in the same wide sense as other terms of relationship, literally and figuratively)

5.gl: desire (and so probably in Proverbs 31:4); hence (by way of alternative) or, also if

5.kj: [idiom] any at all, (have, take) delight, desire, favour, like, move, be (well) pleased, have pleasure, will, would.

5.dv: a primitive root (rather identical with through the idea of opening the eyes);

6.gl: who? (occasionally, by a peculiar idiom, of things); also (indefinitely) whoever; often used in oblique construction with prefix or suffix
6.kj: any (man), [idiom] he, [idiom] him, [phrase] O that! what, which, who(-m, -se, -soever), [phrase] would to God.
6.dv: an interrogative pronoun of persons, as H4100 (מָה) is of things,

6.gl: to smoke, i.e. turn into fragrance by fire (especially as an act of worship)
6.kj: burn (incense, sacrifice) (upon), (altar for) incense, kindle, offer (incense, a sacrifice).
6.dv: a primitive root (identical with through the idea of fumigation in a close place and perhaps thus driving out the occupants);

6.gl: a pasture (i.e. open field, whither cattle are driven); by implication, a desert; also speech (including its organs)
6.dv: from H1696 (דָבַר) in the sense of driving;

6.kj: hereby (-in, -with), it, likewise, the one (other, same), she, so (much), such (deed), that, therefore, these, this (thing), thus.

6.gl: frankincense (from its whiteness or perhaps that of its smoke)

champion, chief, [idiom] excel, giant, man, mighty (man, one), strong (man), valiant man.

8.dv: contracted for H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ) (or perhaps rather from an unused root meaning to be extant);

8.gl: properly, to goad, i.e. (by implication) to teach (the rod being an Oriental incentive)
8.kj: (un-) accustomed, [idiom] diligently, expert, instruct, learn, skilful, teach(-er, -ing).

8.gl: the thigh (from its fleshy softness); by euphemistically the generative parts; figuratively, a shank, flank, side
8.dv: from an unused root meaning to be soft;

8.gl: drought; also a cutting instrument (from its destructive effect), as a knife, sword, or other sharp implement
8.kj: axe, dagger, knife, mattock, sword, tool.
